source: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.
hypothesis: Comets inaweza kuwa chanzo cha usafirishaji wa maji kwa ardhi pamoja na mafuta ya organic ambayo inaweza kujenga proteins na kusaidia maisha.
reference: Kuna uwezekano kwamba nyotamkia zilikuwa chanzo cha kusafirisha maji katika dunia, pamoja na vitu vilivyo na kaboni vinavyoweza kuunda protini na kusaidia uhai.
